--- Main Page ---
Two Birds Taphouse: Craft Beer, Pizza and Burgers on the Marietta Square
Landing Page
Main content starts here, tab to start navigating
Scroll Down to Content
old meets new meets you
Welcome to Two Birds Taphouse! Offering 32 taps of craft beer, rotating cocktails, wood-fired pizza, boutique wine & seasonally inspired shared plates. Your modern-day "Cheers" on the Marietta Square.
Order Here for Pickup
We're open for Dine-In and Take-out!
Send a little something for a loved one who needs a night out.
Gift Cards
What's On Tap
We feature mostly local and regional craft beers from Georgia and the Southeast. With 32 taps rotating weekly, you can try something new or revisit an old favorite.
Current Lineup
Follow us
@twobirds_taphouse

About Us | Two Birds Taphouse: Craft Beer, Pizza and Burgers on the Marietta Square
Main content starts here, tab to start navigating
About & Team
Scroll Down to Content
Slide 1 of 3
Slide 2 of 3
Slide 3 of 3
hero gallery paused, press to play images slides
Playing hero gallery, press to pause images slides
Our Story
Two Birds Taphouse is a family owned and operated bar and restaurant off the Marietta Square. Marietta locals Jeff and Rachel Byrd partnered with their son Dan and his wife Lauren, to open the bar they all would want to patron themselves.
Each member brought a different interest to the table... Jeff with his love of cooking and craft beer, Rachel with her experience in managing properties and love for the community, Dan with his love for design and craft cocktails, and Lauren with her passion for wine and 17 years of experience in the hospitality industry.
Together, they set out to completely renovate and restore a beautiful historic property.
Contemporary fixtures combined with the building’s historic bones provide an industrial space that maintains a warm and inviting ambience. Two Birds is a welcoming neighborhood gastropub perfect for any and all occasions! You’ll always find friendly people you can count on for good drinks, food and conversation.
We look forward to hosting you soon!

--- Page: /private-events ---
Private Events | Two Birds Taphouse: Craft Beer, Pizza and Burgers on the Marietta Square
Main content starts here, tab to start navigating
Private Events
Scroll Down to Content
Throw a Party
From an intimate party to a full buyout of up to 170 guests, we have an option to fit your event!
Please fill out the form below for more info including pricing, availability and private events menus.
Inquire Now
The Back Bar
The Back Bar is a fun, semi-private space with beer garden seating, shuffleboard table, board games and a projector for all your screening desires!
Capacity:
30 Seated, 35 Standing
Third Bird
Third Bird is our newest wing. High ceilings, exposed post and beam construction, and brick walls create a beautiful ambience. This historic space with its own kitchen, equipped with a wood burning pizza oven, bar and bathrooms is perfect for large parties and events like rehearsal dinners, receptions, corporate events, graduations and more.
Capacity:
65 Seated, 80 Standing
Two Birds Full Buyout
Full buyouts of Two Birds Taphouse (this includes both spaces at the same time) are also available for a private and memorable event!
Capacity:
Seated + Standing, 170

meta.meta_description: Bar + Kitchen on the Marietta Square. 32 taps, craft cocktails, wood stone pizza oven, boutique wine & seasonally inspired shared plates.
